prevalence.source: Endocrine Society of India context; thyroid ultrasound epidemiology

burden.dalyPerCapita: low; burden driven by diagnostic work-up and anxiety

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: TSH and thyroid ultrasound; risk stratification by ultrasound features; FNA for suspicious nodules (Bethesda)

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no routine screening; incidental detection common
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on access to ultrasound and FNA

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Ultrasound and FNA concentrated in urban centers; clinical evaluation common in rural areas
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Observation for low-risk nodules; FNA for suspicious; surgery for malignant/high-risk cases
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to ultrasound/FNA outside metros and overdiagnosis in private imaging
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Established endocrinology services in tertiary hospitals
